# Build and Run

## Overview
Qt-LogViewer provides a streamlined process for building and running the application across multiple platforms, including Linux, macOS, and Windows. The project also supports Docker for deployment.

## Prerequisites
- CMake
- Qt development environment
- Compiler toolchain compatible with the target platform

## Configure and Build
1. Clone the repository.
2. Configure the project using CMake.
3. Build the project using the appropriate build tool for your platform.

## Run
After building, execute the generated binary to launch the Qt-LogViewer application.

## Deployment and Docker Notes
The project includes Docker support for deployment. Refer to the provided Docker configuration for setup and usage instructions.
